ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the metrics (e.g., January 2020) */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated during the time period */,
  "arr" REAL /* Annual Recurring Revenue calculated for the time period */,
  "net_retention" REAL /* Net retention rate for the time period */,
  "tcv" REAL /* Total Contract Value realized during the time period */,
  "acv" REAL /* Average Contract Value for the time period */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross Margin percentage during the time period */,
  "arpa" REAL /* Average Revenue per Account calculated for the time period */,
  "arpu" REAL /* Average Revenue per User calculated for the time period */,
  "ebitda_margin" REAL /* EBITDA Margin percentage during the time period */,
  "fcf_margin" REAL /* Free Cash Flow Margin percentage during the time period */,
  "lifetime_fcf_margin" REAL /* Last Twelve Month Free Cash Flow Margin */,
  "rule_of_40" REAL /* Rule of 40 calculated for the time period */,
  "sales_efficiency" REAL /* Sales Efficiency ratio calculated for the time period */,
  "ltv_cac" REAL /* LTV to CAC ratio for the time period */,
  "active_households" INTEGER /* Number of active households during the time period */,
  "recurring_revenue" REAL /* Total recurring revenue during the time period */,
  "new_business_revenue" REAL /* New business revenue acquired during the time period */,
  "expansion_revenue" REAL /* Expansion revenue from existing customers */,
  "contraction_revenue" REAL /* Contraction revenue due to downgrades */,
  "churn_revenue" REAL /* Revenue lost due to churn */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_active_households FOREIGN KEY ("active_households") REFERENCES customer_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_time_period FOREIGN KEY ("time_period") REFERENCES monthly_revenue_growth ("time_period")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_revenue_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth entry */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the revenue growth calculation (e.g., February 2020) */,
  "revenue_growth_rate" REAL /* Percentage growth rate of revenue compared to the previous month */,
  "revenue_base" REAL /* Revenue base for the growth calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer account */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Status of the account (active/inactive) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription (if applicable) */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the subscription plan */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the customer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the customer */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the customer's company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_accounts_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES subscription_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "monthly_fee" REAL /* Monthly fee for the subscription plan */,
  "annual_fee" REAL /* Annual fee for the subscription plan */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features included in the subscription plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subscription plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churn_metrics" (
  "churn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each churn entry */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the churn calculation */,
  "churn_rate" REAL /* Percentage of customers who churned during this period */,
  "customer_lost" INTEGER /* Number of customers lost during this period */,
  "revenue_lost" REAL /* Revenue lost due to churned customers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("churn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investor_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor report */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period that the report covers */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name of the report document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer account */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (success/failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES customer_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional metric entry */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the regional metrics (e.g., January 2020) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of operation */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated during the time period */,
  "arr" REAL /* Annual Recurring Revenue calculated for the time period */,
  "net_retention" REAL /* Net retention rate for the time period */,
  "tcv" REAL /* Total Contract Value realized during the time period */,
  "acv" REAL /* Average Contract Value for the time period */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross Margin percentage during the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the customers in the segment */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the customers' companies in the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_account_segment" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer account */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer segment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the account's membership in the segment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the account's membership in the segment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id", "segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark entry */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the benchmark (e.g., Q1 2020) */,
  "benchmark_type" TEXT /* Type of benchmark (e.g., ARR growth, customer acquisition cost) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_funnel" (
  "funnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales funnel entry */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the sales funnel (e.g., Q2 2020) */,
  "leads" INTEGER /* Number of leads generated */,
  "opportunities" INTEGER /* Number of opportunities in the pipeline */,
  "closed_deals" INTEGER /* Number of deals closed */,
  "revenue_generated" REAL /* Revenue generated from the deals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funnel_id")
)
